'''Yaralou''' was a saturated [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with no [[Moon/Legends|moons]] that occupied the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Color/Legends|yellow]] [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Baralou (star)|Baralou]], which was located within the [[Baralou system/Legends|Baralou system]]<ref name="PoG1" /> of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Varada sector/Legends|Varada sector]].<ref name="EAOC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yaralou was first mentioned in ''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume One]]'', a [[1991]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="PoG1" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Baralou [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Yaralou, in grid square H-20.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
